fields.name: Starters
fields.description: Delicious appetizers to begin your meal

fields.name: Crispy Paneer Tikka
fields.description: Marinated cottage cheese cubes grilled to perfection with aromatic spices. Served with mint chutney.

fields.name: Chicken Wings
fields.description: Crispy golden wings tossed in our signature buffalo sauce. 6 pieces per serving.

fields.name: Mushroom Soup
fields.description: Creamy wild mushroom soup with a hint of truffle oil and crusty bread.

fields.name: Butter Chicken
fields.description: Tender chicken in a rich, creamy tomato-based sauce. India's most loved curry. Served with naan.

fields.name: Dal Makhani
fields.description: Slow-cooked black lentils in a buttery, spiced gravy. A timeless classic.

fields.name: Grilled Salmon
fields.description: Atlantic salmon fillet grilled with lemon herb butter, served with seasonal vegetables.

fields.name: Veg Biryani
fields.description: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with fresh vegetables, saffron and whole spices.

fields.name: Gulab Jamun
fields.description: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in rose-flavored sugar syrup. Served warm.

fields.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
fields.description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten centre, served with vanilla ice cream.

fields.name: Fresh Lime Soda
fields.description: Freshly squeezed lime with chilled soda and a pinch of black salt.

fields.name: Mango Lassi
fields.description: Creamy blended yogurt with ripe Alphonso mangoes. Chilled to perfection.
